LightningComponentBundle.description: A page header component displaying an Account record with icon, title, subtitle, and action buttons. Implements SLDS 2 design system with proper accessibility and responsive design.

property.name: title
property.label: Title
property.description: The main title text displayed in the header

property.name: subtitle
property.label: Subtitle
property.description: The subtitle text displayed below the title

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: The SLDS icon name for the header icon

property.name: showEditButton
property.label: Show Edit Button
property.description: Controls visibility of the Edit button

property.name: showDeleteButton
property.label: Show Delete Button
property.description: Controls visibility of the Delete button

property.name: showCloneButton
property.label: Show Clone Button
property.description: Controls visibility of the Clone button
